title: Savory Umami Korean Flat Rice Noodles Bibimbap
description: A gluten-free friendly Korean dish featuring flat rice noodles, broil, and umami flavors to cure hangovers, this savory bibimbap is a perfect meal for any time of day. It combines crunchy and soft textures with a variety of flavors.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the flat rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce and sesame oil to make the sauce.
Add the sliced beef to the bowl and marinate for at least 10 minutes.
Remove the beef from the marinade and broil for 5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
In a large skillet, saute the shiitake mushrooms, zucchini, and carrots over medium heat until the vegetables are tender.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, sauteed vegetables, and broiled beef.
Drizzle the sauce over the top of the bibimbap and sprinkle with green onions and crushed fried shallots.
